_meta.name: RobloxXea — Community Tools Feed
_meta.description: Auto-updating community library. Every loadstring here has been HTTP-verified (HTTP 200 + real Lua source) against its canonical GitHub repository. In production, host this file at a raw GitHub URL (see CommunityTools.tsx) and re-fetch on every app launch. Same shape as mainTools.json so the same ToolCard renders both feeds.

tools.name: Sp3arParvus
tools.author: JakeHukari
tools.description: Universal aim client and developer tools. Lightweight, single-file, mobile-friendly. Includes silent aim, prediction, and FOV sliders. Popular choice for shooter automation that needs to work across multiple games without per-game configuration.

tools.name: VectorField
tools.author: AsynchronousAI
tools.description: A modern UI library based on Rayfield, designed for the developer who wants Rayfield's polish with additional customization. Drop-in for any script that needs a sleek, animated control panel with notifications and theming.

tools.name: Aether UI
tools.author: yast95
tools.description: A clean UI library inspired by WindUI and Rayfield, with built-in animations, theme manager, and a component set that includes icons. Good middle-ground between minimalism and feature-richness.

tools.name: FxkeDex
tools.author: Fxkez
tools.description: A fork of the classic Dex Explorer by Moon, rebuilt with a modern dark UI and faster instance-tree navigation. Includes property inspector and remote spying integration. 880KB of code — comprehensive feature set.

tools.name: Concealium Dex Explorer
tools.author: Concealium
tools.description: An independent Dex Explorer implementation with a focus on stability and completeness. Inspect any instance in the DataModel, edit properties live, and save/load instance trees. 638KB — rivals FxkeDex in scope.

tools.name: Birdy Place Explorer
tools.author: HAKANKOKCU
tools.description: A high-performance Roblox place explorer that takes a player instance as input and lets you browse the entire DataModel from their perspective. Useful for debugging games that filter Workspace per-player.

tools.name: ItzXery ESP
tools.author: z4tt483
tools.description: A community ESP focused on player visualization — boxes, names, distance, and health bars. Lightweight and tuned for mobile executors. Part of the ItzXery.lua collection of utility scripts.

tools.name: ItzXery AntiLag
tools.author: z4tt483
tools.description: A performance optimizer that disables or downgrades heavy visual effects (shadows, particles, lighting) to boost FPS on low-end devices and mobile. Tunable aggression levels — from gentle to max-FPS.

tools.name: FPS GUI
tools.author: loadfunctype
tools.description: A small GUI that displays real-time FPS, ping, and memory stats in a draggable overlay. Useful while tuning other performance scripts or monitoring executor overhead. Minimal footprint.

tools.name: Ez Hub
tools.author: debug420
tools.description: An open-source script hub that exploits vulnerabilities in popular Roblox games. Modular — has a Plugins folder where the community can drop in their own modules.
